title: Podcast Episode Recap
scenario: Write a 60-word summary of a podcast episode. The summary should include the episode title, a brief overview of the main discussion points, and a concluding sentence with the episode's key takeaway.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the summary accurately represents the podcast episode's main discussion points.
Check if the summary is under 60 words.
Check if the episode title is included in the summary.
